## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Skill change
- [ ] Helper script change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Workflow or packaging change
- [ ] Other

## Public release checklist

- [ ] I did not add paper PDFs, copied abstracts, private reviews, unpublished
      drafts, generated caches, benchmark fixtures, or copyrighted corpora.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, credentials, private links, or local workspace
      output.
- [ ] New or changed skill links point to files included in this repository.
- [ ] Any scripts are deterministic where possible and fail clearly.
- [ ] Attribution, `LICENSE`, and `NOTICE` requirements are preserved.

## Validation

- [ ] `npx skills add . --list`
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile $(find skills -path '*/scripts/*.py')`
- [ ] README relative links checked, if README changed
- [ ] Not run; reason:
